protocol.primary_outcome_question: How frizzy did your hair look this morning? (0=very frizzy, 10=not frizzy at all)
protocol.warnings: The evidence is weak and mixed. The trial is exploratory.

user_message: The uploaded documents point in different directions, so PitGPT should mark the evidence as weak and mixed before generating the protocol.
notes: Must detect conflicting evidence and avoid upgrading to moderate.
